commit_scope: Bind the public kernel-image proposal POST path to a BML front-door kernel-router service. The route catalog is baked into the router image, Hostinger starts a path-specific BML service, deploy-local proof checks the native proposal response, and public verification now fails if the endpoint fans out to Python.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide and wellness passed in a clean dedicated worktree that started on origin/main at 79107642, then rebased onto origin/main at a049029f after native HTTP mutation persistence merged. The production deployment was aligned, but a public POST probe before this slice proved the endpoint still fanned out to Python. The overlay renders with both main's config-backed kernel-router service and this slice's kernel-router-bml-front-door, ROUTES_FILE=/routes/api.bml, and the path-specific Traefik rule for POST /api/substrate/kernel-image/proposals. Local BML front-door proof returned X-Form-Router=native-kernel, proposal_status=accepted-preview, handler=api_substrate_kernel_image_proposals, python_authority=false, and mutation_performed=false. Existing kernel front-door preflight still passes against production-routes.fk.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Public deployment verification will run after merge. The verifier now includes the kernel-image proposal native-route check and will fail if the endpoint is served by Python fanout.

phase_gate.notes: Local source, shell, compose-render, BML route, preflight, spec, generated-index, evidence, JSONL, and diff checks pass. Push, PR, CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A public POST to /api/substrate/kernel-image/proposals is routed to a BML front-door kernel service and must return native-kernel provenance plus native_observation.python_authority=false.
test_flows: Before this slice, production accepted the proposal through the compatibility API but returned no X-Form-Router and no native_observation, proving Python fanout.

Local BML front-door route returns X-Form-Router=native-kernel with proposal_status=accepted-preview, proof_passed=true, handler=api_substrate_kernel_image_proposals, python_authority=false, and mutation.performed=false.
Hostinger deploy-local proof posts the same minimal BML source inside kernel-router-bml-front-door and greps for native-kernel provenance and python_authority=false.
Public deploy verification now posts to the endpoint and fails if X-Form-Router is missing, not native-kernel, or if the BML proof fields are missing.

evidence_refs: Dockerfile.kernel-router copies deploy/front-door/api.bml to /routes/api.bml and keeps STDLIB_DIR available for source compilation.

deploy/kernel-router/docker-compose.kernel-router.yml defines kernel-router-bml-front-door with ROUTES_FILE=/routes/api.bml and a higher-priority Traefik rule for Host(api.coherencycoin.com) && Method(POST) && Path(/api/substrate/kernel-image/proposals).
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh starts kernel-router and kernel-router-bml-front-door, then locally proves the BML route returns X-Form-Router: native-kernel and python_authority=false.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh defines check_kernel_image_native_proposal and runs it as part of the public deployment contract.
Local direct BML proof returned native-kernel provenance and api_substrate_kernel_image_proposals handler for the kernel-image proposal POST path.
scripts/kernel_front_door_local_preflight.sh still passes, proving the existing production manifest canary surface remains intact.
